title: Kadal Naan Thaan Lyrics Endrendrum Punnagai Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Kadal naan thaan
Singer(s): Sudha Raghunathan, Suzanne D’Mello, M.K.Balaji
Movie: Endrendrum Punnagai
Music: Harris Jayaraj
Lyrics: Vaali

Kadal naan thaan, azhai oivadhe illai
sudar naan thaan, velai saivadhe illai
oru thunai illaadhadhu
penmai thuyil kollaadhadhu
unamai thooka kettuthaan,
kannum thaedum unnai

...
idhalaale kadhal kavidhai thaan
unmel ...
ezhudhayo kaali varayil thaan
un angam...
muludhum un paadal varigal thaan

unnai paartha mudhal thadavai
en ulla kadhavai naan thirandhu vitten
udalaagi unnakenave oru uyil ezhudhi
naan irandhuvitten
en thozha un idhalai
en idhalil vaithaal un uyir pilaipen..

en anbae, naan thazhuva nee nazhuva
vittai naan marupadi maruthiduven

thalaivaa un thalaikele
oru thalaganayaai en thodai irukkum
medhuvaai un vizhi thuyila
en valai kulungi mellisai padikkum

angangae pen paravai than siragai
unmeley virikkum
ammaadi un kulirum, en kulirum
illamal nodyinil vilagidumey ..

Kadal naan thaan, azhai oivadhe illai
sudar naan thaan, velai saivadhe illai

...
idhalaale kadhal kavidhai thaan
unmel ...
ezhudhayo kaali varayil thaan
un angam...
muludhum un paadal varigal thaan

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kadal Naan Thaan?

The song explores themes of love, longing, and the eternal nature of romance.

Who composed the music for Endrendrum Punnagai?

The music was composed by Harrish Jeyaraj.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

The song is featured in a romantic setting, highlighting the protagonist's feelings of love and connection.

Who are the singers of Kadal Naan Thaan?

The song is sung by Sudha Raghunathan, Suzanne D'Mello, and Balaji.

When was Endrendrum Punnagai released?

The movie was released in 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Kadal Naan Thaan is a captivating song from the movie Endrendrum Punnagai, beautifully composed by Harrish Jeyaraj. The song, sung by Sudha Raghunathan, Suzanne D'Mello, and Balaji, evokes deep emotions of love and longing. The lyrics by Vaali poetically express the eternal nature of romance, making it a perfect melody for moments of reflection and connection. The soothing tune and heartfelt rendition make it a timeless piece that resonates with anyone who has experienced love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Kadal Naan Thaan from the movie Endrendrum Punnagai is a mesmerizing melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the soulful voices of Sudha Raghunathan and Suzanne D'Mello, and the masterful composition by Harrish Jeyaraj, this song is a timeless romantic classic. Dive into the poetic lyrics penned by Vaali and let the soothing tunes transport you to a world of emotions.
stanzaMeanings: I am the sea, never stopping the call. I am the light, never taking a break. A woman without a companion cannot sleep. The truth is, even in dreams, my eyes search for you.
The first time I saw you, I opened the door to my heart. I wrote a life for you and gave myself away. My friend, if you rest your forehead on mine, I will share my life with you.
My love, when I hug you, you slip away. I will heal again.
Leader, under your leadership, I rest softly on your lap. Your eyes sleep, and my bangles jingle, singing a soft melody.
Here and there, the female bird spreads its wings over you. Without your coolness and mine, the shadow will disappear.
I am the sea, never stopping the call. I am the light, never taking a break.
